_comment: Hook Template — Copy the relevant event block into ~/.claude/settings.json under 'hooks'

_docs.events: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreCompact, PostCompact, Stop, Notification, SessionStart, SessionEnd, SubagentStart, SubagentStop, TaskCreated, TaskCompleted, UserPromptSubmit
_docs.types: command (shell script), prompt (LLM evaluation), agent (agentic verifier), http (webhook)
_docs.matcher: Optional string to filter when hook fires (e.g., tool name like 'Write')
_docs.timeout: Seconds before hook times out (default varies by type)
_docs.async: If true, runs in background without blocking

hooks.prompt: [Question or instruction for LLM to evaluate]. Input: $ARGUMENTS
[What the agent should verify or check]
